MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Marvin Harrell.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Megan Sharrer is present.
Attorney Alex Haskell representing the defendants through Limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Jan. 14, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
